meaning: n.(沙漠中)绿洲,(不毛之地中的)沃洲,舒适的地方
examples: Oasis release their new album on July 1.
It hovered before his eyes like the mirage of an oasis.
The immaculately tended gardens are an oasis in the midst of Cairo's urban sprawl.
The article 'Siwa: An Egyptian oasis' was published in partnership with Lonely Planet.
Then he had trudged from oasis to oasis round the Taklamakan Desert to Kashgar.
